repo_purpose: A utility for managing nested object properties with dot notation and CI/CD pipeline with GitHub workflows.
architecture_summary: This repository consists of two main components: a utility for manipulating nested object properties and a CI/CD configuration using GitHub actions. The utility is primarily implemented in JavaScript and provides TypeScript support through definition files. CI/CD configurations include workflows for Node.js applications, managing dependencies and testing processes.

modules.name: Main Utility
modules.responsibility: Provides JavaScript and TypeScript definitions for getting, setting, and deleting nested object properties.

modules.name: CI/CD Configurations
modules.responsibility: Manages the continuous integration and delivery pipelines using GitHub workflows.

risks.description: Documentation lacks testing information and type checking details.
No detailed setup instructions in README.md.
No tests specified in the root or README file.
LICENSE file is present but lacks detail.
Contradiction on CI/CD setup: .github requires CI/CD while concerns in root suggest none found.
